conservative.name: Urannon's Hasty Relocation
conservative.requirements:
5 Power
Play after an attack, spell, or blessing that targets you resolves

success.description: With an audible crackle, you become a blur of cyan energy and streak effortlessly to a location within long range and within your line of sight. Once you arrive, you become solid once more

boon.description: After reappearing, you may immediately perform a manoeuvre for free

chaosStar.description: The capricious Winds of Magic whisk you away. At the end of your turn, you are briefly snapped back into the turbulent winds and reappear somewhere within close range of your destination (Gm's choice as to where)
